description: Web tool for visualizing and managing Claude Code sub-agent harnesses (AGENTS.md / feature_list.json / .claude/agents). Self-hosted, Docker-deployable, Nothing Design UI.
rules: Only one feature in_progress at a time
Implementer writes code+tests and never marks done
Reviewer is read-only and writes progress/review_<id>.md
Real verification: no mocked file system, no mocked Fastify, no snapshot-only tests
All UI uses tokens.css variables; Tailwind only for layout utilities
TypeScript strict; NodeNext module resolution; .js suffix on all relative imports

features.name: shared-types-baseline
features.title: Shared types package baseline
features.description: Establish @h-orchestra/shared with the core type definitions used across backend and frontend: HarnessState, Feature, AgentDefinition, SkillDefinition, ProgressEntry, SSEEvent discriminated union.
acceptance: packages/shared/src/types/{harness,feature,agent,skill,progress,events}.ts exist with exported types
packages/shared/src/index.ts re-exports all types
pnpm --filter @h-orchestra/shared build succeeds and emits .d.ts
Types are importable from backend and frontend via @h-orchestra/shared
At least one test file exercises the type shapes via runtime assertions

features.name: sse-event-contract
features.title: SSE event contract and constants
features.description: Define the SSE event names and payload shapes shared by backend emitter and frontend consumer.
acceptance: packages/shared/src/constants/sse-events.ts exports event name constants
packages/shared/src/types/events.ts defines a discriminated union keyed on event name
Constants and types are paired (no event name without a payload type)
Unit test asserts every event name has a matching payload type

features.name: path-utilities
features.title: Cross-platform path utilities
features.description: Normalize MOUNT_PATH across macOS, Linux, Windows host (via WSL2). Drop trailing slashes, swap backslashes, resolve symlinks consistently.
acceptance: packages/shared/src/util/paths.ts exports normalizeMountPath(path) and resolveHarnessFile(root, relative)
Tests cover macOS, POSIX, and Windows-style inputs against real strings
Functions are pure and have no fs side effects

features.name: result-and-error-taxonomy
features.title: Result type, error taxonomy, ESLint config
features.description: Generic Result<T,E> type for parser/route returns; structured ParserError and RouteError enums; ESLint flat config wired into pnpm lint.
acceptance: packages/shared/src/util/result.ts exports Result, Ok, Err, isOk, isErr
packages/shared/src/errors.ts exports ParserErrorCode and RouteErrorCode enums plus a discriminated AppError type
Root-level eslint.config.js defines flat config; pnpm lint runs across all packages
ESLint forbids no-unused-vars (with _-prefixed exception), no-explicit-any without justification

features.name: feature-list-parser
features.title: feature_list.json parser
features.description: Parse feature_list.json from the mounted repo into the FeatureList type. Validate schema, surface parse errors as a discriminated union result.
acceptance: packages/backend/src/parsers/feature-list.parser.ts exports parseFeatureList(filePath): Promise<Result<FeatureList, ParseError>>
Rejects unknown status values and missing required fields with structured errors
Tests run against real fixture files in __tests__/fixtures/, not mocked fs
Returns structured error with line context where the JSON parser supports it

features.name: agents-md-parser
features.title: AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md parser
features.description: Parse markdown harness docs, extract section tree (H1/H2/H3) and inline links to other harness files.
acceptance: Parser returns a Section[] tree with title, level, body, anchor
Internal links resolve to relative paths
Missing file returns Result.err, never throws
Tested against fixture markdown including this repo's own AGENTS.md

features.name: agent-definition-parser
features.title: .claude/agents/*.md parser
features.description: Parse agent definition markdown files: YAML frontmatter (name, description, tools) plus body. Used to render the Agents view.
acceptance: Parser uses gray-matter; returns AgentDefinition with frontmatter fields typed
Tools field is normalized to string[] regardless of YAML form
Invalid frontmatter returns Result.err with field-level message
Tests cover all three reference agents: leader, implementer, reviewer

features.name: skill-parser
features.title: .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md parser
features.description: Parse skill definitions with frontmatter (name, description) and body checklist.
acceptance: Parser returns SkillDefinition with name, description, body
Tests cover all four bootstrap skills
Missing or malformed file returns Result.err

features.name: progress-current-parser
features.title: progress/current.md parser
features.description: Parse the live session state: active feature, last action, next action, in-flight subagent.
acceptance: Parser extracts each field defined in the current.md template
Handles partially-filled files gracefully
Returns Result<ProgressCurrent, ParseError>

features.name: progress-history-parser
features.title: progress/history.md parser
features.description: Parse the append-only session log into chronological entries with timestamp, feature id, and summary.
acceptance: Returns ProgressEntry[] sorted descending by timestamp
Handles missing dates and non-standard headings
Tested against this repo's own history.md fixture

features.name: impl-review-report-parser
features.title: progress/impl_*.md and review_*.md parser
features.description: Discover and parse implementer + reviewer reports keyed by feature id.
acceptance: Parser globs progress/impl_*.md and review_*.md
Returns map of featureId -> { impl?, review? }
Reviewer verdict (APPROVED | CHANGES_REQUESTED) is extracted from the markdown structure

features.name: mermaid-sequence-builder
features.title: Mermaid sub-agent interaction diagram builder
features.description: Build a Mermaid sequenceDiagram from progress/history.md entries and impl/review reports describing leader → implementer / reviewer dispatches.
acceptance: Builder takes ProgressEntry[] and report map, returns a valid Mermaid string
Output is validated by parsing it through Mermaid's parser, not by string equality
Edge cases covered: empty history, single dispatch, repeated review cycles

features.name: harness-aggregator
features.title: Harness aggregator (composes all parsers)
features.description: Compose every parser into a single HarnessState snapshot. Collects per-file errors without throwing.
acceptance: buildHarnessSnapshot(rootPath) returns HarnessState with parsed sections plus a parseErrors[] list
Aggregator never throws on malformed input
Integration test against this repo's own harness produces a non-empty snapshot

features.name: health-and-version
features.title: Health and version routes
features.description: GET /health returns {ok:true}; GET /api/version returns the package version.
acceptance: Both routes registered and tested against a real Fastify instance
Version is read from packages/shared exports
200 status, correct content-type

features.name: harness-snapshot-route
features.title: Harness snapshot route
features.description: GET /api/harness returns the current HarnessState built by the aggregator.
acceptance: Route returns full HarnessState plus parseErrors
Cached for 1s to coalesce parallel requests; cache invalidated on watcher event
Test against a tmp dir with a real harness fixture

features.name: features-crud
features.title: Features CRUD routes
features.description: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/features with optimistic concurrency on feature_list.json.
acceptance: POST creates a new feature with auto-generated id
PATCH updates fields (status, title, acceptance) atomically
DELETE removes a feature; 409 if it is in_progress
Concurrent writes preserved via etag/version field
Tests use a real tmp feature_list.json

features.name: features-reorder
features.title: Reorder features route
features.description: PATCH /api/features/reorder accepts an ordered id list and rewrites feature_list.json preserving JSON formatting.
acceptance: Reorder produces stable diff (no whitespace drift)
Tests assert formatting preservation on a real fixture
Returns 400 if posted ids don't match existing set

features.name: agents-route
features.title: Agents list route
features.description: GET /api/agents returns the parsed AgentDefinition[] from .claude/agents/.
acceptance: Route returns leader, implementer, reviewer with full frontmatter
Test against this repo's own .claude/agents/

features.name: skills-route
features.title: Skills list route
features.description: GET /api/skills returns parsed SkillDefinition[].
acceptance: Route returns the four bootstrap skills
Each entry includes name, description, body, source path

features.name: diagram-route
features.title: Diagram route
features.description: GET /api/diagram returns Mermaid string + parsed events.
acceptance: Mermaid output passes parse validation
Optional ?feature=<id> filter restricts to one feature's interactions

features.name: templates-registry-route
features.title: Templates registry route
features.description: GET /api/templates lists built-in (python, dotnet) and uploaded templates.
acceptance: Built-ins always present; uploaded templates loaded from data dir
Each entry exposes id, label, language, required placeholders

features.name: templates-scaffold-route
features.title: Template scaffold route
features.description: POST /api/templates/:id/scaffold writes a new harness into a target directory with placeholder substitution.
acceptance: Refuses to overwrite a non-empty target directory
Validates required placeholders before writing any file
Test scaffolds Python template into tmp dir and asserts file contents

features.name: templates-upload-route
features.title: Template upload route
features.description: POST /api/templates accepts a ZIP, validates structure (must contain CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, feature_list.json, init.sh), registers as user template.
acceptance: ZIP extraction sandboxed against path traversal
Invalid ZIP returns 422 with structured error
Test uploads a fixture ZIP and asserts it appears in the registry

features.name: tracing-route
features.title: Tracing route
features.description: GET /api/tracing returns adapter-normalized recent traces (Langfuse + Helicone).
acceptance: Adapter selected by env (LANGFUSE_BASE_URL or HELICONE_API_KEY)
Missing config returns empty list, not error
Adapter contract has a single getRecentTraces(limit) method

features.name: sse-events-route
features.title: SSE events stream route
features.description: GET /events long-lived SSE; replays last N events on connect.
acceptance: Connection survives 60s idle (heartbeat ping every 15s)
Last 50 events replayed on connect
Watcher events propagate to all clients within 200ms of file change

features.name: chokidar-wiring
features.title: Chokidar watcher wiring
features.description: Watch CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, CHECKPOINTS.md, feature_list.json, .claude/agents/**, .claude/skills/**, progress/**, docs/**.
acceptance: Watcher emits HarnessChanged with the changed path
Tests use real Chokidar against a tmp dir, no mocks
Cleanly closes on SIGTERM

features.name: debounce-event-bus
features.title: Debounce + normalized event bus
features.description: 150ms debounce per file path; emit a single normalized HarnessChanged event per quiet window.
acceptance: Rapid 10x writes within 100ms produce one event
Distinct paths debounced independently
Test asserts timing tolerance ±50ms

features.name: polling-fallback
features.title: Cross-platform polling fallback
features.description: Honor CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=true for Docker bind mounts on macOS/Windows.
acceptance: Env var flips usePolling on the Chokidar instance
Documented in docs/architecture.md
Smoke test under polling mode produces events for tmp dir changes

features.name: langfuse-adapter
features.title: Langfuse adapter
features.description: Pull recent traces from self-hosted Langfuse via env-configured base URL + key.
acceptance: Adapter implements getRecentTraces(limit)
Test against a real fastify mock-server fixture (NOT vi.mock of fetch)
Errors normalized to TracingError

features.name: helicone-adapter
features.title: Helicone adapter
features.description: Pull recent traces from Helicone via API key.
acceptance: Adapter implements getRecentTraces(limit)
Test against a real fastify mock-server fixture
Errors normalized to TracingError

features.name: tracing-adapter-registry
features.title: Tracing adapter registry
features.description: Pluggable registry; tracing route picks adapter by env var; missing config returns empty list, never errors.
acceptance: Registry exposes resolveAdapter(env) returning Adapter | null
Tests cover both adapter selection and the no-config case

features.name: primitive-components
features.title: Nothing Design primitive components
features.description: Card, Badge, PillButton, MetricDisplay, SegmentedProgress, DotMatrix, MechanicalToggle, ErrorBoundary — all token-driven, no inline colors.
acceptance: Each primitive has a Storybook-equivalent example in __tests__/<name>.test.tsx asserting rendered structure
All colors come from var(--color-*); zero hex literals in components
Touch targets ≥44px where interactive
Type signatures exported from the package index

features.name: layout-shell
features.title: Layout shell (AppShell + TopBar + Sidebar)
features.description: Top-level grid with Sidebar nav (DASHBOARD/TASKS/AGENTS/SKILLS/DIAGRAM/SCAFFOLD/TRACING) and TopBar status; useKeyboardNav hook for 1-7 shortcuts.
acceptance: Shell renders without layout shift on viewport resize 320-1920px
Keyboard 1-7 changes active view; tested via Testing Library fireEvent
Active view indicator uses the bracket-style Nothing Design pattern

features.name: connection-banner
features.title: SSE connection banner
features.description: MetricDisplay-based banner showing SSE connection state; turns color-critical when disconnected for >2s.
acceptance: Banner reflects useSSE() connection state
Disconnect/reconnect cycle is visible within 1s
No layout shift when state changes

features.name: dashboard-view
features.title: Dashboard view
features.description: Composite of HarnessStatusCard, TaskSummaryCard, AgentsMdViewer, ProgressCurrentPanel, GitLogPanel, AgentActivityFeed.
acceptance: All sub-cards render real data when /api/harness returns a snapshot
Empty states are explicit ('[NO ACTIVE FEATURE]') not blank panels
Test asserts each sub-card by role/text

features.name: tasks-view
features.title: Tasks view
features.description: Task list with status, hierarchy, drag-to-reorder (dnd-kit), inline add/edit/delete via TaskForm.
acceptance: Drag reorder calls /api/features/reorder and reflects new order on success
Optimistic update with rollback on 4xx
Inline edit validates acceptance criteria are non-empty
Tests use real DOM with dnd-kit Provider, not snapshot

features.name: agents-view
features.title: Agents view
features.description: Card grid of AgentDefinition with frontmatter chips (tools), expandable body.
acceptance: Each card shows name, description, tools as chips
Body expands inline (no modal) per Nothing Design rule
Test asserts all three reference agents render

features.name: skills-view
features.title: Skills view
features.description: Card grid of SkillDefinition with description and body link.
acceptance: Search input filters skills by name + description (debounced 200ms)
Test covers empty state and search filter

features.name: diagram-view
features.title: Sub-agent interaction diagram view
features.description: Mermaid sequence diagram of subagent interactions parsed from history; pan/zoom; click an actor to filter.
acceptance: Renders a non-empty diagram for this repo's own harness
Click on actor filters the diagram (re-renders)
Pan/zoom via mouse wheel + drag; tested with Testing Library user-event

features.name: scaffold-view
features.title: Scaffold view
features.description: Template picker (built-in + uploaded), placeholder form, target path input, dry-run preview, scaffold action.
acceptance: Dry run shows file tree preview without writing
Validation errors surface inline next to each placeholder field
Successful scaffold shows a [DONE] confirmation; failed scaffold shows error inline

features.name: tracing-view
features.title: Tracing view
features.description: Adapter selector tabs (Langfuse/Helicone), recent traces list, trace detail panel.
acceptance: Tabs only show configured adapters
Trace list paginates by 20
Detail panel displays span tree with relative durations

features.name: templates-engine
features.title: Template engine core
features.description: String template substitution with {{placeholder}} syntax; validates required placeholders.
acceptance: renderTemplate(template, vars) errors clearly on missing placeholder
Escapes are honored ({{{literal}}} renders {{literal}})
Tests cover happy path, missing var, escaped braces

features.name: python-template
features.title: Built-in Python harness template
features.description: CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, feature_list.json, init.sh, SKILL.md templates tuned for Python (python -m unittest discover).
acceptance: Scaffold into tmp dir; running its init.sh exits 0 (with python3 available)
Placeholders: PROJECT_NAME, PROJECT_DESCRIPTION, PYTHON_MIN_VERSION
init.sh template is executable and POSIX-compliant

features.name: dotnet-template
features.title: Built-in .NET harness template
features.description: Same set tuned for .NET (dotnet test, dotnet build in init.sh).
acceptance: Scaffold into tmp dir; running its init.sh exits 0 (with dotnet available)
Placeholders: PROJECT_NAME, PROJECT_DESCRIPTION, DOTNET_VERSION
init.sh template is executable and POSIX-compliant

features.name: user-template-registry
features.title: User-uploaded template registry
features.description: Persist uploaded ZIPs under data dir, scan on boot.
acceptance: Data dir configurable via TEMPLATES_DIR env (default /data/templates)
Boot scan registers all valid templates
Invalid templates logged but do not crash boot

features.name: image-size-and-multiarch
features.title: Dockerfile size budget + multi-arch
features.description: Tighten Dockerfile to <250MB final image; build amd64 + arm64.
acceptance: Final image size <250MB on linux/amd64 and linux/arm64
GitHub Actions docker workflow builds both arches
Smoke test passes on both arches in CI

features.name: compose-troubleshooting
features.title: Compose REPO_PATH troubleshooting docs
features.description: Document common path issues (Mac File Sharing, Windows path translation) in README.
acceptance: README has a Troubleshooting section with copy-pastable fixes
Compose file fails fast with clear error if REPO_PATH unset

features.name: windows-path-support
features.title: Windows host path support
features.description: entrypoint.sh + watcher polling fallback verified on Windows host with WSL2.
acceptance: Manual test on Windows + WSL2 documented in docs/architecture.md
CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING auto-set when MOUNT_PATH starts with /mnt/
Path normalization handles forward and backslash inputs

features.name: graceful-shutdown
features.title: Health and graceful shutdown
features.description: SIGTERM closes Fastify and watcher cleanly within 5s.
acceptance: Shutdown logs explicit 'closed watcher' and 'closed fastify' messages
Container stops within 5s of docker stop
Test sends SIGTERM to a real backend instance and asserts clean exit

features.name: self-hosting-smoke
features.title: Self-hosting smoke test
features.description: Run H-Orchestra Docker container against this repo's own harness; assert all views render with non-empty data.
acceptance: CI job builds image, mounts ${{ github.workspace }} as /mounted-repo
curl /api/harness returns non-empty features and agents
Headless browser hits / and asserts root text 'H-ORCHESTRA' present

features.name: reorder-roundtrip
features.title: Reorder + persist roundtrip
features.description: Reorder features in UI, assert feature_list.json on disk reflects order, no JSON formatting drift.
acceptance: Playwright (or equivalent) test drags task and asserts file change
Diff of feature_list.json is exactly the reorder, no whitespace drift

features.name: scaffold-roundtrip
features.title: Scaffold roundtrip
features.description: Scaffold a Python harness into a tmp dir, run its init.sh, assert exit 0.
acceptance: End-to-end scaffold + run init.sh in CI on a Linux runner with python3 installed
Generated CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/feature_list.json all parse with the H-Orchestra parsers
